top_signals.title: Five Below Slides After Profit Beat as Retailer Flags Consumer Hit Over Oil High Prices
top_signals.summary: Shares of Five Below Inc. tumbled on Wednesday after the discount retailer beat first-quarter earnings expectations and raised its full-year profit guidance but signaled caution over the consumer in the months ahead.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Jim Cramer warns excess supply could be the next biggest threat to the bull market
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer warned that a growing wave of AI-related capital raises could overwhelm investor demand and create a near-term headwind for stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bessent backs summer push for Clarity Act, says bitcoin reserve moving at ‘deliberate speed’
top_signals.summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the department is moving at a "deliberate speed" to establish a strategic bitcoin reserve.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Remaining anchored: Monetary Policy in an unpredictable world - speech by Andrew Bailey
top_signals.summary: Given at the Reykjavík Economic Conference 2026, Iceland
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Can AI make cutlery? -  speech by Andrew Bailey
top_signals.summary: Given at the 389th Cutlers’ Feast, Cutlers’ Hall, Sheffield
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
